posts.title: When the Future Arrives Eight Years Early: Rewatching The Rise of the Machines in 2026
posts.excerpt: I clicked on a Kurzgesagt video from 2018 expecting a familiar take on AI. Instead I found an eight-year-old map of the world I'm living in today — and a forcing function to rethink where I want to stand in it. On agentic AI, embodied intelligence, and the narrow window to help engineer the transfer.
